description: User-provided GPS checkpoints (2026-07-21, Geocoding.xlsx) at a 1-minute cadence for the first 26 minutes of a 41:17 east-west Berlin crossing: Alexanderplatz -> Spittelmarkt -> Leipziger Strasse -> Potsdamer Platz -> north past the Brandenburg Gate -> Strasse des 17. Juni -> Ernst-Reuter-Platz -> Bismarckstrasse -> Kaiserdamm to Theodor-Heuss-Platz. Times are video-absolute; the source link's &t=970s is incidental (a 970 s offset would put the 26:00 fix past the 2477 s video end). 4:00 fix corrected 2026-07-22 (user-supplied; the source sheet's 4:00 cell was a stale copy of 3:00 - do not re-import it from Geocoding.xlsx). 9th GT clip, first German mega-city, added UNTESTED (first run pending on stronger hardware). NOTE: the evaluator uses every fix in this file - when analyzing a sub-window (e.g. --vo-segment 0:420), run against a copy trimmed to that span.
